name: Python + Hugging Face
postCreateCommand: python -m venv ${workspaceFolder}/.venv && ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y git-lfs
